name: Bamboo Shelf Natural - Brightroom™
description:
Add more storage space to your kitchen countertops or cupboards with this Bamboo Stackable Helper Shelf from Brightroom™. Showcasing a simple design, this stackable wooden shelf features a slatted top that's ideal for holding a variety of small kitchen tools or items on top, while also letting you slide things underneath to maximize space. In a natural bamboo wood finish, this helper shelf brings farmhouse-inspired charm to your kitchen aesthetics.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
